S.FORM: Franklyn Ajaye kawas tay 1949, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 5, Franklyn Ajaye, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *rankljn ajaje kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *rankljn ajaje, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
